---
title: "Project Map"
description: "An interactive dependency map of the BEDC project: each node is a namecert region, each edge a dependency, sized by theorem count, colored by status. Click any node for the bilingual term entry. EN / 中文 toggle at top right."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/cytoscape@3.30.2/dist/cytoscape.min.css">
---

```{=html}
<style>
  body { background: #fbfbfa; }
  /* Lock the Quarto wrapper to viewport height (minus 62px navbar) so
     the map shell can fit on a 13" laptop without forcing scroll.
     Wrapper paddings and Quarto's default page footer are zeroed. */
  #quarto-content {
    height: calc(100vh - 62px) !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  main.content {
    padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
    height: calc(100vh - 62px) !important;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .page-footer, #quarto-content > footer { display: none !important; }
  #title-block-header { display: none; }

  .map-shell {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 240px;
    grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
    grid-template-areas: "header header" "graph detail" "footer footer";
    /* Parent (#quarto-content) is locked to viewport-minus-navbar, so
       the shell just fills its parent. min-height is a tablet floor.
       overflow:hidden + min-height:0 on grid items prevents the
       detail panel's min-content from inflating the grid past parent. */
    height: 100%;
    min-height: 540px;
    overflow: hidden;
    gap: 0;
    background: #fbfbfa;
    border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  }
  .map-shell > * { min-height: 0; min-width: 0; }
  main.content > .quarto-section-identifier { display: none; }
  .quarto-container { max-width: 100% !important; padding: 0 !important; }
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .map-shell { grid-template-columns: 1fr; grid-template-areas: "header" "graph" "detail" "footer"; height: auto; }
    #cy-wrap { height: 540px; } #cy { height: 100%; }
    #detail { max-height: 480px; overflow-y: auto; }
  }

  .map-header {
    grid-area: header;
    padding: 0.7rem 1.2rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.7rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0; background: #fff;
  }
  .map-header h1 { margin: 0; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }
  .map-header .summary { font-size: 0.86rem; color: #666; }
  .map-header .summary strong { color: #222; }
  .map-controls { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end; }
  .lang-toggle { font-size: 0.85rem; }
  .lang-toggle button {
    border: 1px solid #ccc; background: white; padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
    cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.85rem;
  }
  .lang-toggle button.active { background: #222; color: white; border-color: #222; }
  .region-picker {
    font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.88rem;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #bbb; border-radius: 3px;
    background: white; min-width: 220px; cursor: pointer;
  }
  .region-picker:focus { outline: 2px solid #2c3e50; outline-offset: -1px; }

  #cy-wrap { grid-area: graph; position: relative; height: 100%; background: #fbfbfa; }
  #cy { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
  .zoom-controls {
    position: absolute;
    top: 12px; left: 12px;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px;
    z-index: 10;
  }
  .zoom-controls button {
    width: 32px; height: 32px;
    border: 1px solid #d0d0d0;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1;
    cursor: pointer; padding: 0;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: inherit; color: #333;
    transition: background 0.12s;
  }
  .zoom-controls button:hover { background: #f4f4f4; }
  .zoom-controls button:active { background: #e8e8e8; }
  .zoom-controls button:focus { outline: 2px solid #2c3e50; outline-offset: 1px; }
  .map-filters {
    position: absolute;
    top: 12px; right: 12px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
    border: 1px solid #d0d0d0;
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 0.55rem 0.7rem;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    z-index: 10;
    max-width: 280px;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  }
  .map-filters .ftitle {
    font-weight: 600; color: #444; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; font-size: 0.78rem;
  }
  .map-filters .stub-row {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.35rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.45rem; padding-bottom: 0.4rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
    cursor: pointer; user-select: none;
  }
  .map-filters .stub-row input { cursor: pointer; margin: 0; }
  .map-filters .stub-row .lc-count { color: #888; font-size: 0.74rem; }
  .map-filters .layer-grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.25rem; }
  .map-filters .layer-chip {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem;
    padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;
    border: 1px solid #bbb; border-radius: 12px;
    cursor: pointer; user-select: none;
    background: white; color: #555;
    font-size: 0.74rem;
    transition: background 0.12s, color 0.12s, border-color 0.12s;
  }
  .map-filters .layer-chip.active {
    background: #2c3e50; color: white; border-color: #2c3e50;
  }
  .map-filters .layer-chip .lc-count { font-size: 0.68rem; opacity: 0.75; }

  #detail {
    grid-area: detail; padding: 1.2rem; overflow-y: auto;
    border-left: 1px solid #e0e0e0; background: #fff; font-size: 0.92rem;
  }
  #detail .hint { color: #aaa; font-style: italic; }
  #detail .term-name { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; }
  #detail .term-other { color: #888; font-size: 0.95rem; margin-left: 0.4rem; font-style: italic; }
  #detail .term-desc { margin-top: 0.5rem; line-height: 1.55; }
  #detail .term-other-desc { margin-top: 0.4rem; color: #777; line-height: 1.5; font-style: italic; }
  #detail .term-stats {
    margin-top: 0.9rem; padding-top: 0.7rem; border-top: 1px dashed #ddd;
    font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.84rem;
  }
  #detail .term-stats span { display: inline-block; margin-right: 0.6rem; padding: 0.1rem 0.45rem; background: #f4f4f4; border-radius: 3px; }
  #detail .term-deps { margin-top: 0.7rem; font-size: 0.86rem; color: #555; }
  #detail .term-deps a { color: #2c3e50; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: underline dotted; margin-right: 0.4rem; }
  #detail .term-deps a:hover { color: #c0392b; }
  #detail .term-namecerts {
    margin-top: 0.9rem; padding-top: 0.7rem; border-top: 1px dashed #ddd;
    font-size: 0.83rem;
  }
  #detail .term-namecerts-header {
    font-weight: 600; color: #444; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; font-size: 0.85rem;
  }
  #detail .nc-row {
    padding: 0.15rem 0; line-height: 1.4;
    word-break: break-all;
  }
  #detail .nc-row code {
    font-size: 0.78rem; color: #2c3e50; background: transparent;
  }
  #detail .legend { margin-top: 1.5rem; padding-top: 0.9rem; border-top: 1px solid #eee; font-size: 0.82rem; color: #666; }
  #detail .legend .swatch {
    display: inline-block; width: 14px; height: 14px; vertical-align: middle;
    margin-right: 0.3rem;
  }
  #detail .legend .swatch.circle {
    border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }
  #detail .legend .swatch.hex {
    /* Cytoscape's hexagon shape, mirrored as a CSS clip-path so the legend
       matches the on-graph node silhouette exactly. */
    clip-path: polygon(25% 6%, 75% 6%, 100% 50%, 75% 94%, 25% 94%, 0% 50%);
  }
  #detail .legend > div { padding: 0.12rem 0; }
  #detail .legend .legend-note {
    margin-top: 0.45rem; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #888; line-height: 1.45;
  }
  #detail .closure-table {
    margin-top: 0.8rem; padding-top: 0.7rem; border-top: 1px dashed #ddd;
    font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.4;
  }
  #detail .closure-row {
    padding: 0.3rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f3f3;
  }
  #detail .closure-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  #detail .closure-label {
    color: #888; font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    margin-bottom: 0.15rem;
  }
  #detail .closure-value { color: #333; overflow-wrap: anywhere; }
  #detail .closure-value code {
    font-size: 0.78rem; color: #2c3e50; background: transparent;
    white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  }
  #detail .crit-list { margin-top: 0.7rem; }
  #detail .crit-list a {
    display: block; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
    background: #fef5f3; border-left: 3px solid #c0392b; cursor: pointer;
    text-decoration: none; color: #222; font-size: 0.86rem;
  }
  #detail .crit-list a:hover { background: #fdebe7; }
  #detail .crit-list .crit-meta { color: #888; font-size: 0.78rem; margin-left: 0.4rem; }
  #detail .legend-subhead {
    font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; color: #555;
    margin-top: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }
  #detail .legend-subhead.legend-subhead-tight { margin-top: 0.65rem; }
  #detail .legend-tier-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 0.2rem 0.6rem; margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
  }
  #detail .legend-tier-grid .tier-cell {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem;
    font-size: 0.82rem; color: #333;
  }
  #detail .legend-tier-grid .tier-chip {
    display: inline-block; width: 14px; height: 14px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.15); border-radius: 50%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  #detail .dyn-coverage {
    font-size: 0.82rem; color: #2c3e50; margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
    padding: 0.35rem 0.55rem; background: #f4faf6; border-radius: 3px;
    border-left: 3px solid #27ae60; line-height: 1.45;
  }
  #detail .dyn-coverage .dyn-coverage-breakdown {
    font-size: 0.74rem; color: #888; margin-top: 0.15rem;
  }
  #detail .dyn-section-title {
    font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; color: #555;
    margin-top: 0.55rem; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  }
  #detail .dyn-list a {
    display: block; padding: 0.22rem 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.18rem;
    background: #f4f7fa; border-left: 3px solid #3498db; cursor: pointer;
    text-decoration: none; color: #222; font-size: 0.84rem;
  }
  #detail .dyn-list a:hover { background: #e7eef5; }
  #detail .dyn-list .dyn-meta { color: #888; font-size: 0.74rem; margin-left: 0.35rem; }
  #detail .dyn-list .dyn-empty {
    color: #999; font-style: italic; font-size: 0.8rem; padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
  }
  #detail .glossary-toggle {
    margin-top: 1rem; padding: 0.4rem 0.7rem; width: 100%;
    border: 1px solid #ccc; background: white; border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.85rem;
    text-align: left;
  }
  #detail .glossary-toggle:hover { background: #f4f4f4; }
  #detail .glossary-toggle.active { background: #2c3e50; color: white; border-color: #2c3e50; }
  #glossary-pane {
    position: fixed; top: 0; right: 0; width: 420px; height: 100vh;
    background: white; border-left: 1px solid #ccc;
    box-shadow: -4px 0 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    overflow-y: auto; z-index: 1000;
    transform: translateX(100%); transition: transform 0.2s ease;
  }
  #glossary-pane.open { transform: translateX(0); }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-header {
    position: sticky; top: 0; padding: 0.8rem 1.2rem;
    background: #fff; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-header button {
    border: none; background: transparent; font-size: 1.4rem;
    cursor: pointer; color: #666;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-body { padding: 0.8rem 1.2rem; }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-section {
    margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-section h3 {
    font-size: 0.78rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    color: #888; margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0; font-weight: 600;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-entry {
    padding: 0.4rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f4f4f4;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-entry:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-entry .term {
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-entry .term-zh {
    color: #888; font-style: italic; margin-left: 0.4rem; font-size: 0.88rem;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-entry .desc {
    margin-top: 0.25rem; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.45; color: #444;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-entry .desc-zh {
    margin-top: 0.2rem; font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 1.45; color: #888;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .map-footer {
    grid-area: footer; padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
    border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0; background: #fff;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; font-size: 0.83rem; color: #666;
  }
  #spark { flex: 1; height: 28px; }
  .map-footer .meta { white-space: nowrap; }
</style>

<div class="map-shell">
  <div class="map-header">
    <h1 data-i18n="title">BEDC Project Map</h1>
    <div class="summary" id="summary"></div>
    <select id="region-picker" class="region-picker" onchange="onPickerChange(this.value)">
      <option value="" data-i18n="picker_default">-- jump to region --</option>
    </select>
    <div class="map-controls">
      <div class="lang-toggle">
        <span data-i18n="lang_label" style="margin-right:0.4rem;">Language:</span>
        <button id="btn-en" class="active" onclick="setLang('en')">EN</button>
        <button id="btn-zh" onclick="setLang('zh')">中文</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="cy-wrap">
    <div id="cy"></div>
    <div class="zoom-controls" id="zoom-controls">
      <button type="button" id="zoom-in" data-i18n-title="zoom_in" title="Zoom in" aria-label="Zoom in">+</button>
      <button type="button" id="zoom-out" data-i18n-title="zoom_out" title="Zoom out" aria-label="Zoom out">&#8722;</button>
      <button type="button" id="zoom-reset" data-i18n-title="zoom_reset" title="Fit to view" aria-label="Fit to view"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2 5V2h3M9 2h3v3M12 9v3H9M5 12H2V9"/></svg></button>
    </div>
    <div class="map-filters" id="map-filters">
      <div class="ftitle" data-i18n="filter_title">Filters</div>
      <label class="stub-row">
        <input type="checkbox" id="stub-toggle" />
        <span data-i18n="filter_stubs">Show stubs</span>
        <span class="lc-count">(<span id="stub-count">0</span>)</span>
      </label>
      <div class="layer-grid" id="layer-grid"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="detail">
    <div id="detail-content">
      <div class="hint" data-i18n="hint">Click a node to see its bilingual entry, stats, and dependencies.</div>
    </div>

    <div class="legend">
      <div data-i18n="crit_title" style="font-weight:600; color:#444; margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Where AI is attacking now</div>
      <div id="crit-list" class="crit-list"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="legend">
      <div data-i18n="dyn_title" style="font-weight:600; color:#444; margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Closure pipeline</div>
      <div id="dyn-coverage" class="dyn-coverage"></div>
      <div data-i18n="unblock_title" class="dyn-section-title">Top unblock targets</div>
      <div id="unblock-list" class="dyn-list"></div>
      <div data-i18n="next_grade_title" class="dyn-section-title">Next grade transitions</div>
      <div id="next-grade-list" class="dyn-list"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="legend">
      <div data-i18n="legend_title" style="font-weight:600; color:#444; margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Legend</div>
      <div class="legend-subhead" data-i18n="legend_color_head">Color = theory closure tier</div>
      <div class="legend-tier-grid">
        <div class="tier-cell"><span class="tier-chip" style="background:#f7dc6f;"></span><span class="tier-name" data-i18n="tier_seed">seed</span></div>
        <div class="tier-cell"><span class="tier-chip" style="background:#f39c12;"></span><span class="tier-name" data-i18n="tier_obligation">obligation</span></div>
        <div class="tier-cell"><span class="tier-chip" style="background:#27ae60;"></span><span class="tier-name" data-i18n="tier_scoped">scoped</span></div>
        <div class="tier-cell"><span class="tier-chip" style="background:#e91e63;"></span><span class="tier-name" data-i18n="tier_public">public</span></div>
        <div class="tier-cell"><span class="tier-chip" style="background:#2980b9;"></span><span class="tier-name" data-i18n="tier_bridged">bridged</span></div>
        <div class="tier-cell"><span class="tier-chip" style="background:#7d3c98;"></span><span class="tier-name" data-i18n="tier_mature">mature</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="legend-subhead legend-subhead-tight" data-i18n="legend_color_overrides">Overrides</div>
      <div><span class="swatch circle" style="background:#c0392b;"></span><span data-i18n="legend_crit">Frontline (AI's current target)</span></div>
      <div><span class="swatch circle" style="background:#3498db;"></span><span data-i18n="legend_prog">In progress (theorems landing, no closurestatus yet)</span></div>
      <div><span class="swatch circle" style="background:#34495e;"></span><span data-i18n="legend_schema">Schema-only horizon (intentional)</span></div>
      <div><span class="swatch circle" style="background:#bdc3c7;"></span><span data-i18n="legend_scaf">Scaffold (paper only, Lean pending)</span></div>
      <div class="legend-subhead legend-subhead-tight" data-i18n="legend_shape_head">Shape = formal verification tier</div>
      <div class="legend-note" data-i18n="legend_shape">○ unformalized · △ statement-only or in-progress · ⬡ theorem-checked · ★ audit / axiom / bridge clean</div>
      <div class="legend-note" data-i18n="legend_size">Size = total paper obligations (checked + stated). Border = thick red for AI's current target.</div>
    </div>

    <button class="glossary-toggle" onclick="toggleGlossary()">
      <span data-i18n="glossary_btn">📖 Browse all bilingual terms</span>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div id="glossary-pane">
    <div class="glossary-header">
      <span data-i18n="glossary_title">Bilingual Glossary</span>
      <button onclick="toggleGlossary()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="glossary-body" id="glossary-body"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="map-footer">
    <span class="meta"><span data-i18n="footer_activity">Daily commits</span></span>
    <svg id="spark" preserveAspectRatio="none"></svg>
    <span class="meta" id="footer-range"></span>
    <span class="meta" id="footer-updated"></span>
  </div>
</div>

<script src="https://unpkg.com/cytoscape@3.30.2/dist/cytoscape.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/dagre@0.8.5/dist/dagre.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/cytoscape-dagre@2.5.0/cytoscape-dagre.js"></script>

<script>
const I18N = {
  en: {
    title: "BEDC Project Map",
    lang_label: "Language:",
    hint: "Click a node to see its bilingual entry, stats, and dependencies.",
    legend_title: "Legend",
    legend_color_head: "Color = theory closure tier",
    legend_color_overrides: "Overrides",
    tier_seed: "seed",
    tier_obligation: "obligation",
    tier_scoped: "scoped",
    tier_public: "public",
    tier_bridged: "bridged",
    tier_mature: "mature",
    legend_shape_head: "Shape = formal verification tier",
    legend_crit: "Frontline (AI's current target)",
    legend_prog: "In progress (theorems landing, no closurestatus yet)",
    legend_scaf: "Scaffold (paper only, Lean pending)",
    legend_schema: "Schema-only horizon (intentional)",
    legend_shape: "○ unformalized · △ statement-only or in-progress · ⬡ theorem-checked · ★ audit / axiom / bridge clean",
    legend_size: "Size = total paper obligations (checked + stated). Border = thick red for AI's current target.",
    filter_title: "Filters",
    filter_stubs: "Show stubs",
    crit_title: "Where AI is attacking now",
    dyn_title: "Closure pipeline",
    unblock_title: "Top unblock targets",
    next_grade_title: "Next grade transitions",
    dyn_coverage_label: "closed",
    dyn_unblocks_meta: "unblocks",
    dyn_none: "(none yet)",
    tier_none: "(none)",
    footer_activity: "Daily commits",
    footer_updated: "Updated",
    sum_theorems: "theorems",
    sum_regions: "regions",
    sum_edges: "edges",
    detail_thms: "Lean theorems",
    detail_checked: "checked",
    detail_stmt: "stated",
    detail_files: "files",
    detail_score: "score",
    detail_downstream: "downstream",
    detail_deps: "Depends on:",
    detail_namecerts: "Object-completion theorems",
    detail_grounded_by: "Closure grounded by",
    detail_theory_closure: "Theory closure",
    detail_scope_closed: "Scope closed",
    detail_formal_verification: "Formal verification",
    detail_lean_target: "Lean target",
    detail_bridge_status: "Bridge status",
    detail_not_claimed: "Not claimed",
    detail_upgrade_path: "Upgrade path",
    detail_none: "none",
    detail_closed_no_grounding: "Closed by closurestatus block, with no Lean target declared yet. Add the canonical Lean theorem ID to surface it here.",
    picker_default: "-- jump to region --",
    grp_kernel: "Kernel primitives",
    grp_namecert: "NameCert framework",
    grp_methodology: "Methodology",
    grp_discrete: "Discrete primitives",
    grp_number: "Number systems",
    grp_algebra: "Algebra",
    grp_order: "Order / lattice",
    grp_topology: "Topology",
    grp_categorical: "Categorical",
    grp_analysis: "Complex analysis",
    grp_zeta: "Dirichlet / Zeta",
    grp_reflection: "Reflection / capstone",
    grp_roadmap: "Roadmap (future Up types)",
    grp_other: "Other",
    glossary_btn: "📖 Browse all bilingual terms",
    glossary_title: "Bilingual Glossary",
    zoom_in: "Zoom in",
    zoom_out: "Zoom out",
    zoom_reset: "Fit to view",
  },
  zh: {
    title: "BEDC 项目地图",
    lang_label: "语言:",
    hint: "点击节点查看双语词条, 统计和依赖关系.",
    legend_title: "图例",
    legend_color_head: "颜色 = 理论闭合等级",
    legend_color_overrides: "特殊态",
    tier_seed: "seed (种子)",
    tier_obligation: "obligation (义务)",
    tier_scoped: "scoped (范围)",
    tier_public: "public (公开)",
    tier_bridged: "bridged (桥接)",
    tier_mature: "mature (成熟)",
    legend_shape_head: "形状 = 形式化验证等级",
    legend_crit: "前线 (AI 当前攻坚)",
    legend_prog: "进行中 (有定理在落, 尚未声明 closurestatus)",
    legend_scaf: "脚架 (仅论文, Lean 待补)",
    legend_schema: "Schema-only 视界 (有意为之)",
    legend_shape: "○ 未形式化 · △ 仅陈述或进行中 · ⬡ 定理已证 · ★ audit / axiom / bridge clean",
    legend_size: "节点大小 = 论文 obligation 总数 (checked + stated). 边框 = 红色粗边表示 AI 当前攻坚目标.",
    filter_title: "过滤",
    filter_stubs: "显示空 stub",
    crit_title: "AI 当前攻坚位置",
    dyn_title: "闭合流水线",
    unblock_title: "高优先解锁目标",
    next_grade_title: "近期可推进闭合等级",
    dyn_coverage_label: "已闭合",
    dyn_unblocks_meta: "解锁",
    dyn_none: "(暂无)",
    tier_none: "(无)",
    footer_activity: "每日提交数",
    footer_updated: "数据更新",
    sum_theorems: "定理",
    sum_regions: "领域",
    sum_edges: "依赖边",
    detail_thms: "Lean 定理",
    detail_checked: "已证",
    detail_stmt: "陈述",
    detail_files: "文件",
    detail_score: "得分",
    detail_downstream: "下游影响",
    detail_deps: "依赖于:",
    detail_namecerts: "对象完成性定理",
    detail_grounded_by: "闭合证据",
    detail_theory_closure: "理论闭合",
    detail_scope_closed: "闭合范围",
    detail_formal_verification: "形式化验证",
    detail_lean_target: "Lean 目标",
    detail_bridge_status: "桥接状态",
    detail_not_claimed: "未声明",
    detail_upgrade_path: "升级路径",
    detail_none: "无",
    detail_closed_no_grounding: "通过 closurestatus 块闭合，但未声明 Lean target。在论文块中加上权威 Lean 定理 ID 即可在此显示。",
    picker_default: "-- 跳到领域 --",
    grp_kernel: "内核原语",
    grp_namecert: "NameCert 框架",
    grp_methodology: "方法论",
    grp_discrete: "离散原语",
    grp_number: "数系",
    grp_algebra: "代数",
    grp_order: "序 / 格",
    grp_topology: "拓扑",
    grp_categorical: "范畴",
    grp_analysis: "复分析",
    grp_zeta: "Dirichlet / ζ",
    grp_reflection: "反思 / capstone",
    grp_roadmap: "路线图 (未来 Up 类型)",
    grp_other: "其他",
    glossary_btn: "📖 浏览全部双语术语",
    glossary_title: "双语术语表",
    zoom_in: "放大",
    zoom_out: "缩小",
    zoom_reset: "适应窗口",
  },
};

let LANG = "en";
let STATUS = null, GLOSSARY = null, DEPS = null, CY = null;
let CRIT_SET = new Set();

async function loadData() {
  const v = "?v=" + Date.now();
  const [s, g, d] = await Promise.all([
    fetch("data/status.json" + v, { cache: "no-store" }).then(r => r.json()),
    fetch("data/glossary.json" + v, { cache: "no-store" }).then(r => r.json()),
    fetch("data/dependency.json" + v, { cache: "no-store" }).then(r => r.json()),
  ]);
  STATUS = s; GLOSSARY = g; DEPS = d;
  CRIT_SET = new Set((STATUS.critical_path || []).map(c => c.name));
}

function t(key) { return I18N[LANG][key] || key; }

function applyStaticI18n() {
  document.querySelectorAll("[data-i18n]").forEach(el => {
    const key = el.getAttribute("data-i18n");
    if (I18N[LANG][key] !== undefined) el.innerHTML = I18N[LANG][key];
  });
  document.querySelectorAll("[data-i18n-title]").forEach(el => {
    const key = el.getAttribute("data-i18n-title");
    const val = I18N[LANG][key];
    if (val !== undefined) {
      el.setAttribute("title", val);
      el.setAttribute("aria-label", val);
    }
  });
  document.getElementById("btn-en").classList.toggle("active", LANG === "en");
  document.getElementById("btn-zh").classList.toggle("active", LANG === "zh");
  document.getElementById("summary").innerHTML =
    `<strong>${STATUS.total_theorems}</strong> ${t("sum_theorems")} · ` +
    `<strong>${DEPS.nodes.length}</strong> ${t("sum_regions")} · ` +
    `<strong>${DEPS.edges.length}</strong> ${t("sum_edges")}`;
  populatePicker();
}

// Group regions into mathematical areas for the dropdown picker.
const REGION_GROUPS = [
  ["grp_kernel",       ["kernel"]],
  ["grp_discrete",     ["bool", "option", "prod", "sum", "list"]],
  ["grp_number",       ["nat", "add", "int", "rat", "real", "complex", "prime"]],
  ["grp_algebra",      ["monoid", "group", "abgroup", "ring", "commring", "field",
                        "module", "vecspace", "linearmap", "matrix", "polynomial", "fps"]],
  ["grp_order",        ["preorder", "poset", "totalorder", "lattice", "interval"]],
  ["grp_topology",     ["metric", "compact", "continuous", "s1"]],
  ["grp_categorical",  ["category", "functor", "nattrans"]],
  ["grp_analysis",     ["complexlimit", "convergenceradius", "complexdiff",
                        "holomorphic", "complexseries", "contour", "anacont"]],
  ["grp_zeta",         ["dirichletseries", "zetabasic", "zetacont", "critstrip", "zetazeros"]],
  ["grp_reflection",   ["observer", "interhist"]],
];

function pickerOptionLabel(node) {
  const g = GLOSSARY[node.id];
  const en = g ? g.en.label : node.id;
  const zh = g ? g.zh.label : "";
  return LANG === "zh"
    ? `${zh}${en !== zh ? "  ·  " + en : ""}`
    : `${en}${zh && zh !== en ? "  ·  " + zh : ""}`;
}

function populatePicker() {
  const sel = document.getElementById("region-picker");
  if (!sel) return;
  const idsInGraph = new Set(DEPS.nodes.map(n => n.id));
  const placed = new Set();

  // build option groups from REGION_GROUPS, then a final "Other" group for stragglers
  const groups = REGION_GROUPS.map(([key, ids]) => ({
    key,
    items: ids.filter(id => idsInGraph.has(id)),
  })).filter(g => g.items.length > 0);
  groups.forEach(g => g.items.forEach(id => placed.add(id)));
  const leftover = DEPS.nodes
    .filter(n => !placed.has(n.id))
    .map(n => n.id)
    .sort();
  if (leftover.length) groups.push({ key: "grp_other", items: leftover });

  let html = `<option value="">${t("picker_default")}</option>`;
  for (const g of groups) {
    html += `<optgroup label="${t(g.key)}">`;
    for (const id of g.items) {
      const node = DEPS.nodes.find(n => n.id === id);
      if (!node) continue;
      html += `<option value="${id}">${pickerOptionLabel(node)}</option>`;
    }
    html += `</optgroup>`;
  }
  sel.innerHTML = html;
}

function onPickerChange(id) {
  if (!id) return;
  showNodeDetail(id);
}

// --- Glossary side pane ----------------------------------------------------
// Group ordering for the side pane. Each entry: [i18n_key, [glossary keys]].
// Glossary keys not listed here fall into 'grp_other'.
const GLOSSARY_GROUPS = [
  ["grp_kernel",      ["BHist", "Hist", "Cont", "hsame", "psame", "msame", "E0", "E1", "kernel"]],
  ["grp_namecert",    ["NameCert", "SourceSpec", "PatternSpec", "ClassifierSpec", "StabilityCert", "LedgerPolicy"]],
  ["grp_methodology", ["axiom-purity", "schema-only"]],
  ["grp_discrete",    ["bool", "option", "prod", "sum", "list"]],
  ["grp_number",      ["nat", "add", "int", "rat", "real", "complex", "prime"]],
  ["grp_algebra",     ["monoid", "group", "abgroup", "ring", "commring", "field",
                       "module", "vecspace", "linearmap", "matrix", "polynomial", "fps"]],
  ["grp_order",       ["preorder", "poset", "totalorder", "lattice", "interval"]],
  ["grp_topology",    ["metric", "compact", "continuous", "s1", "circle"]],
  ["grp_categorical", ["category", "functor", "nattrans"]],
  ["grp_analysis",    ["complexlimit", "convergenceradius", "complexdiff",
                       "holomorphic", "complexseries", "contour", "anacont"]],
  ["grp_zeta",        ["dirichletseries", "zetabasic", "zetacont", "critstrip", "zetazeros", "zeta"]],
  ["grp_reflection",  ["observer", "interhist"]],
  ["grp_roadmap",     ["padic", "adele", "norm", "hilbert", "magma", "semigroup", "topology",
                       "completion", "calculus", "measure", "functionalanalysis",
                       "manifold", "bundle", "homology", "rh", "eq", "func", "limit",
                       "fold", "setlike", "typelike", "mul", "order"]],
];

function renderGlossary() {
  const body = document.getElementById("glossary-body");
  const placed = new Set();
  let html = "";
  for (const [groupKey, keys] of GLOSSARY_GROUPS) {
    const items = keys.filter(k => GLOSSARY[k]);
    if (!items.length) continue;
    items.forEach(k => placed.add(k));
    html += `<div class="glossary-section"><h3>${t(groupKey)}</h3>`;
    for (const k of items) {
      const g = GLOSSARY[k];
      const primary = LANG === "zh" ? g.zh : g.en;
      const other   = LANG === "zh" ? g.en : g.zh;
      html += `
        <div class="glossary-entry">
          <span class="term">${primary.label}</span>
          ${other.label && other.label !== primary.label ? `<span class="term-zh">${other.label}</span>` : ""}
          <div class="desc">${primary.desc}</div>
          ${other.desc && other.desc !== primary.desc ? `<div class="desc-zh">${other.desc}</div>` : ""}
        </div>`;
    }
    html += `</div>`;
  }
  // Anything left over goes under "Other"
  const leftover = Object.keys(GLOSSARY).filter(k => !placed.has(k));
  if (leftover.length) {
    html += `<div class="glossary-section"><h3>${t("grp_other")}</h3>`;
    for (const k of leftover) {
      const g = GLOSSARY[k];
      const primary = LANG === "zh" ? g.zh : g.en;
      const other   = LANG === "zh" ? g.en : g.zh;
      html += `
        <div class="glossary-entry">
          <span class="term">${primary.label}</span>
          ${other.label && other.label !== primary.label ? `<span class="term-zh">${other.label}</span>` : ""}
          <div class="desc">${primary.desc}</div>
          ${other.desc && other.desc !== primary.desc ? `<div class="desc-zh">${other.desc}</div>` : ""}
        </div>`;
    }
    html += `</div>`;
  }
  body.innerHTML = html;
}

function toggleGlossary() {
  const pane = document.getElementById("glossary-pane");
  pane.classList.toggle("open");
  if (pane.classList.contains("open")) renderGlossary();
}

// Two visual channels for the two-axis closurestatus framework:
//   color  = theory closure tier — 6 distinct color families, plus 3
//            categorical overrides (schema / crit / scaffold)
//   shape  = formal verification tier (ellipse < triangle < hexagon < star).
//            Triangle also catches "has theorems but no closurestatus
//            declared" — the old standalone "progress blue" merged here,
//            freeing blue for the bridged tier.
//   border = AI-frontline emphasis (red for crit, white otherwise)
const NODE_PALETTE = {
  // Theory-closure tier — six distinct hue families. We deliberately jump
  // out of the green/teal family at `public` so scoped (green) and public
  // (pink) read as completely different categories instead of "two
  // shades of the same green". `bridged` stays in blue but bright enough
  // to be legible on white; `progress` stays in the same blue family but
  // visibly lighter (sky blue vs ocean blue).
  seed:        "#f7dc6f",  // yellow       — germinating
  obligation:  "#f39c12",  // orange       — committed
  scoped:      "#27ae60",  // green        — anchor / current default
  public:      "#e91e63",  // hot pink     — broader surface, jumps out of green family
  bridged:     "#2980b9",  // ocean blue   — bridge surface
  mature:      "#7d3c98",  // amethyst     — fully integrated
  // Categorical overrides
  progress:    "#3498db",  // sky blue     — has theorems, no closurestatus yet
  schema:      "#34495e",  // dark slate   — intentional schema-only horizon
  crit:        "#c0392b",  // red          — AI's current target
  scaffold:    "#bdc3c7",  // light gray   — paper-only, Lean pending
};

const TIER_CLASS = {
  seedClosure:       "seed",
  obligationClosure: "obligation",
  scopedClosure:     "scoped",
  publicClosure:     "public",
  bridgedClosure:    "bridged",
  matureClosure:     "mature",
};

function statusClass(node) {
  if (node.schema_only) return "schema";
  if (CRIT_SET.has(node.id)) return "crit";
  if (node.id === "kernel") return "scoped";       // kernel proven by construction
  const tier = node.closed_theoryclosure;
  if (tier && TIER_CLASS[tier]) return TIER_CLASS[tier];
  // No closurestatus declared. Distinguish in-flight (theorems landing)
  // from truly empty so the stub filter only hides the latter.
  if (nodeHasProgress(node)) return "progress";
  return "scaffold";
}

function nodeHasProgress(node) {
  return (node.checked || 0) > 0 || (node.stmt || 0) > 0 ||
         (node.namecert_checked || 0) > 0 || (node.thms || 0) > 0;
}

// Formal-verification tier → shape, collapsed to 4 maximally distinguishable
// silhouettes. The intermediate `formalTargetV / encodedDefV / scaffoldCheckedV`
// tier collapses to triangle ("statement-only"); the three "audit-clean or
// above" tiers collapse to star ("audit / axiom / bridge clean"). When a
// chapter has Lean theorems but no closurestatus block yet, we also emit
// triangle so "in-progress without declared closure" reads as
// statement-level work, not as nothing.
//   null / unformalizedV                                            → ellipse
//   formalTargetV / encodedDefV / scaffoldCheckedV                  → triangle
//   theoremCheckedV                                                 → hexagon
//   auditCleanV / axiomCleanV / bridgeCheckedV                      → star
const VERIF_SHAPE = {
  unformalizedV:    "ellipse",
  formalTargetV:    "triangle",
  encodedDefV:      "triangle",
  scaffoldCheckedV: "triangle",
  theoremCheckedV:  "hexagon",
  auditCleanV:      "star",
  axiomCleanV:      "star",
  bridgeCheckedV:   "star",
};

function nodeShape(node) {
  if (node.id === "kernel") return "hexagon";  // kernel theorem-checked by construction
  const verif = node.closed_formalstatus;
  if (verif && VERIF_SHAPE[verif]) return VERIF_SHAPE[verif];
  if (nodeHasProgress(node)) return "triangle";  // theorems landing, no closurestatus yet
  return "ellipse";
}

function nodeBorder(node, cls) {
  if (cls === "crit") return { stroke: "#7e1810", borderWidth: 3 };
  return { stroke: "#ffffff", borderWidth: 2 };
}

function nodeVisual(node) {
  const cls = statusClass(node);
  const fill = NODE_PALETTE[cls] || NODE_PALETTE.scaffold;
  const shape = nodeShape(node);
  return { cls, fill, shape, ...nodeBorder(node, cls) };
}

function nodeSizeMetric(node) {
  // Size = total paper obligations (proxy for chapter "weight"), not Lean theorem count.
  // Kernel has no paper markers; anchor it to a representative size.
  if (node.id === "kernel") return 12;
  return (node.checked || 0) + (node.stmt || 0);
}

function nodeLabel(node) {
  const g = GLOSSARY[node.id];
  if (g) return g[LANG].label;
  return node["label_" + LANG] || node.label_en || node.id;
}

function refreshNodeVisuals() {
  if (!CY) return;
  CY.nodes().forEach(n => {
    const node = DEPS.nodes.find(d => d.id === n.id());
    if (!node) return;
    const visual = nodeVisual(node);
    n.data("cls", visual.cls);
    n.data("color", visual.fill);
    n.data("stroke", visual.stroke);
    n.data("borderWidth", visual.borderWidth);
    n.data("shape", visual.shape);
  });
  CY.style().update();
}

function escapeHtml(value) {
  return String(value ?? "")
    .replaceAll("&", "&amp;")
    .replaceAll("<", "&lt;")
    .replaceAll(">", "&gt;")
    .replaceAll('"', "&quot;")
    .replaceAll("'", "&#39;");
}

function detailValue(value, code = false) {
  const text = value || t("detail_none");
  const safe = escapeHtml(text);
  return code ? `<code>${safe}</code>` : safe;
}

// ----- Filter UI -----
const LEVEL_BUCKETS = [
  { id: "b0", label: "L0–3",   min: 0,  max: 3 },
  { id: "b1", label: "L4–8",   min: 4,  max: 8 },
  { id: "b2", label: "L9–13",  min: 9,  max: 13 },
  { id: "b3", label: "L14–17", min: 14, max: 17 },
  { id: "b4", label: "L18–21", min: 18, max: 21 },
  { id: "b5", label: "L22–25", min: 22, max: 25 },
];

let SHOW_STUBS = false;
const ACTIVE_BUCKETS = new Set(LEVEL_BUCKETS.map(b => b.id));

function nodeIsStub(n) {
  return statusClass(n) === "scaffold";
}

function nodeBucketId(level) {
  for (const b of LEVEL_BUCKETS) {
    if (level >= b.min && level <= b.max) return b.id;
  }
  return null;
}

function applyFilters() {
  if (!CY) return;
  CY.batch(() => {
    DEPS.nodes.forEach(n => {
      const node = CY.getElementById(n.id);
      if (!node || node.empty()) return;
      const stub = nodeIsStub(n);
      const bucket = nodeBucketId(n.level);
      const show = (SHOW_STUBS || !stub) && ACTIVE_BUCKETS.has(bucket);
      node.style("display", show ? "element" : "none");
    });
  });
  // Re-run dagre on visible elements only so the remaining nodes spread
  // across the full viewport instead of inheriting the cramped 250-node
  // layout. Layout is fast; we re-run on every toggle.
  const visible = CY.elements(":visible");
  if (visible.length > 0) {
    visible.layout({
      name: "dagre",
      rankDir: "LR",
      nodeSep: 22,
      rankSep: 150,
      edgeSep: 10,
      ranker: "network-simplex",
      padding: 16,
      fit: true,
      animate: false,
    }).run();
    CY.fit(visible, 16);
  }
}

function buildFilterUI() {
  const stubsCount = DEPS.nodes.filter(nodeIsStub).length;
  const stubCountEl = document.getElementById("stub-count");
  if (stubCountEl) stubCountEl.textContent = stubsCount;

  const cb = document.getElementById("stub-toggle");
  if (cb) {
    cb.checked = SHOW_STUBS;
    cb.onchange = e => { SHOW_STUBS = e.target.checked; applyFilters(); };
  }

  const grid = document.getElementById("layer-grid");
  if (!grid) return;
  grid.innerHTML = "";
  LEVEL_BUCKETS.forEach(b => {
    const count = DEPS.nodes.filter(n => n.level >= b.min && n.level <= b.max).length;
    const chip = document.createElement("div");
    chip.className = "layer-chip" + (ACTIVE_BUCKETS.has(b.id) ? " active" : "");
    chip.dataset.bucket = b.id;
    chip.innerHTML = `${b.label} <span class="lc-count">${count}</span>`;
    chip.onclick = () => {
      if (ACTIVE_BUCKETS.has(b.id)) {
        ACTIVE_BUCKETS.delete(b.id);
        chip.classList.remove("active");
      } else {
        ACTIVE_BUCKETS.add(b.id);
        chip.classList.add("active");
      }
      applyFilters();
    };
    grid.appendChild(chip);
  });
}

function renderCy() {
  const nodes = DEPS.nodes.map(n => {
    const visual = nodeVisual(n);
    return {
      data: {
        id: n.id, label: nodeLabel(n),
        thms: n.thms || 0, score: n.score || 0,
        downstream: n.downstream || 0, cls: visual.cls,
        color: visual.fill,
        stroke: visual.stroke,
        borderWidth: visual.borderWidth,
        shape: visual.shape,
        size: nodeSizeMetric(n),
        checked: n.checked || 0, stmt: n.stmt || 0,
        schema_only: !!n.schema_only,
      },
    };
  });
  const edges = DEPS.edges.map((e, i) => ({
    data: { id: "e" + i, source: e.source, target: e.target }
  }));

  CY = cytoscape({
    container: document.getElementById("cy"),
    elements: [...nodes, ...edges],
    style: [
      {
        selector: "node",
        style: {
          "shape": "data(shape)",
          "background-color": "data(color)",
          "label": "data(label)",
          "font-size": "60px",
          "font-weight": 700,
          "color": "#0f0f0f",
          "text-valign": "bottom",
          "text-halign": "center",
          "text-margin-y": 20,
          "text-outline-color": "#fbfbfa",
          "text-outline-width": 9,
          "text-background-color": "#fbfbfa",
          "text-background-opacity": 0.92,
          "text-background-padding": "8px",
          "text-background-shape": "roundrectangle",
          "width": "mapData(size, 0, 30, 50, 110)",
          "height": "mapData(size, 0, 30, 50, 110)",
          "border-width": "data(borderWidth)",
          "border-color": "data(stroke)",
          "overlay-padding": 4,
        },
      },
      { selector: "node[cls = 'crit']", style: { "border-width": 3, "border-color": "#7e1810" } },
      {
        selector: "node:selected",
        style: {
          "border-width": 8,
          "border-color": "#f39c12",
          "border-opacity": 1,
          "overlay-color": "#f39c12",
          "overlay-opacity": 0.18,
          "overlay-padding": 12,
          "z-index": 999,
        }
      },
      {
        selector: "edge",
        style: {
          "width": 1.5, "line-color": "#7a8a99",
          "target-arrow-color": "#7a8a99", "target-arrow-shape": "triangle",
          "curve-style": "bezier", "arrow-scale": 0.95,
          "opacity": 0.55,
        },
      },
      { selector: "edge.highlight", style: { "line-color": "#c0392b", "target-arrow-color": "#c0392b", "width": 3, "opacity": 1 } },
      { selector: "edge.faded", style: { "opacity": 0.06 } },
      { selector: "node.faded", style: { "opacity": 0.15 } },
    ],
    layout: {
      name: "dagre",
      // BEDC dependency is a DAG; LR shows primitives (left) → derived
      // (right). nodeSep tuned tight, rankSep wide so the natural shape
      // matches the wide viewport (.map-shell extends to full height
      // via calc(100vh - 30px) so 108 nodes can breathe vertically).
      rankDir: "LR",
      nodeSep: 22,
      rankSep: 150,
      edgeSep: 10,
      ranker: "network-simplex",
      padding: 16,
      fit: true,
      animate: false,
    },
    // Disable wheel/pinch zoom (per request); pan-drag remains for nudging
    // so the dropdown's centered jump can be fine-tuned without the user
    // ever needing to scroll-zoom. The +/-/fit buttons drive zoom
    // programmatically — bounds keep them sane.
    userZoomingEnabled: false,
    userPanningEnabled: true,
    boxSelectionEnabled: false,
    wheelSensitivity: 0,
    autoungrabify: true,
    minZoom: 0.05,
    maxZoom: 4,
  });
  setupZoomControls();

  CY.on("tap", "node", evt => showNodeDetail(evt.target.id()));
  CY.on("tap", evt => {
    if (evt.target === CY) {
      document.getElementById("detail-content").innerHTML =
        `<div class="hint">${t("hint")}</div>`;
      CY.elements().removeClass("highlight").removeClass("faded");
      CY.nodes().unselect();
      // Tapping empty space clears the selection only — keep the current
      // zoom / pan so the user's view isn't snapped back unexpectedly.
    }
  });
  // Global view: fit all nodes in the viewport. With the bigger font and
  // outline below, labels stay legible even when fit-zoomed. The dropdown
  // is the primary nav for jumping between specific regions.
  CY.fit(undefined, 16);
}

function setupZoomControls() {
  if (!CY) return;
  const stepZoom = factor => {
    const w = CY.width(), h = CY.height();
    const next = CY.zoom() * factor;
    CY.zoom({ level: next, renderedPosition: { x: w / 2, y: h / 2 } });
  };
  const bind = (id, fn) => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.onclick = fn;
  };
  bind("zoom-in",  () => stepZoom(1.25));
  bind("zoom-out", () => stepZoom(0.8));
  bind("zoom-reset", () => {
    const visible = CY.elements(":visible");
    const eles = visible.length ? visible : CY.elements();
    CY.animate({ fit: { eles, padding: 16 } }, { duration: 300, easing: "ease-out" });
  });
}

function showNodeDetail(id) {
  const node = DEPS.nodes.find(n => n.id === id);
  const g = GLOSSARY[id];
  if (!node) return;

  CY.elements().removeClass("highlight").removeClass("faded");
  CY.nodes().unselect();
  const cyNode = CY.getElementById(id);
  cyNode.select();

  // Find the full upstream subtree (all ancestors) and downstream subtree (all descendants)
  const upstream = new Set([id]);
  const downstream = new Set([id]);
  const queueUp = [id];
  while (queueUp.length) {
    const cur = queueUp.shift();
    DEPS.edges.forEach(e => {
      if (e.target === cur && !upstream.has(e.source)) {
        upstream.add(e.source);
        queueUp.push(e.source);
      }
    });
  }
  const queueDown = [id];
  while (queueDown.length) {
    const cur = queueDown.shift();
    DEPS.edges.forEach(e => {
      if (e.source === cur && !downstream.has(e.target)) {
        downstream.add(e.target);
        queueDown.push(e.target);
      }
    });
  }
  const keep = new Set([...upstream, ...downstream]);

  CY.nodes().forEach(n => { if (!keep.has(n.id())) n.addClass("faded"); });
  CY.edges().forEach(e => {
    const s = e.data("source"), t = e.data("target");
    if (keep.has(s) && keep.has(t)) e.addClass("highlight");
    else e.addClass("faded");
  });

  // Zoom into the connected subgraph (selected node + ancestors +
  // descendants). Tap on background restores the global fit (see the
  // tap-on-CY handler below).
  const focusEles = CY.elements().filter(el => {
    if (el.isNode()) return keep.has(el.id());
    return keep.has(el.data("source")) && keep.has(el.data("target"));
  });
  CY.animate(
    { fit: { eles: focusEles, padding: 60 } },
    { duration: 350, easing: "ease-out" }
  );

  const incoming = DEPS.edges
    .filter(e => e.target === id)
    .map(e => e.source)
    .filter(s => DEPS.nodes.find(n => n.id === s));

  const otherLang = LANG === "en" ? "zh" : "en";

  let html = "";
  if (g) {
    html += `<div class="term-name">${g[LANG].label}<span class="term-other">${g[otherLang].label}</span></div>`;
    html += `<div class="term-desc">${g[LANG].desc}</div>`;
    html += `<div class="term-other-desc">${g[otherLang].desc}</div>`;
  } else {
    html += `<div class="term-name">${id}</div>`;
    html += `<div class="term-desc" style="color:#888;">(no glossary entry)</div>`;
  }

  const stats = [];
  if (node.checked) stats.push(`<span style="background:#e9f7ef;color:#1e7c43;"><strong>${node.checked}</strong> ${t("detail_checked")}</span>`);
  if (node.stmt) stats.push(`<span style="background:#eaf3fb;color:#1f5d8a;"><strong>${node.stmt}</strong> ${t("detail_stmt")}</span>`);
  if (typeof node.thms === "number" && node.thms > 0) stats.push(`<span><strong>${node.thms}</strong> ${t("detail_thms")}</span>`);
  if (node.downstream) stats.push(`<span><strong>${node.downstream}</strong> ${t("detail_downstream")}</span>`);
  if (node.score) stats.push(`<span><strong>${node.score.toFixed(2)}</strong> ${t("detail_score")}</span>`);
  if (node.schema_only) stats.push(`<span style="background:#f4ecf7;color:#7d3c98;">${t("legend_schema")}</span>`);
  else if (CRIT_SET.has(id)) stats.push(`<span style="background:#fef5f3;color:#c0392b;">${t("legend_crit")}</span>`);
  if (stats.length) html += `<div class="term-stats">${stats.join(" ")}</div>`;

  if (incoming.length) {
    const links = incoming.map(s => {
      const sg = GLOSSARY[s];
      const lbl = sg ? sg[LANG].label : s;
      return `<a onclick="showNodeDetail('${s}')">${lbl}</a>`;
    });
    html += `<div class="term-deps">${t("detail_deps")} ${links.join(" ")}</div>`;
  }

  if (node.closed_theoryclosure) {
    const rows = [
      ["detail_theory_closure", node.closed_theoryclosure, true],
      ["detail_scope_closed", node.scope_closed, false],
      ["detail_formal_verification", node.closed_formalstatus, true],
      ["detail_lean_target", node.closure_grounding, true],
      ["detail_bridge_status", node.closed_bridge_status, true],
      ["detail_not_claimed", node.not_claimed, false],
      ["detail_upgrade_path", node.upgrade_path, false],
    ];
    html += `<div class="closure-table">`;
    for (const [labelKey, value, code] of rows) {
      html += `<div class="closure-row">` +
        `<div class="closure-label">${t(labelKey)}</div>` +
        `<div class="closure-value">${detailValue(value, code)}</div>` +
        `</div>`;
    }
    html += `</div>`;
  }

  // Object-completion / closure-grounding section. Three sources, in
  // priority order:
  //   1. closure_grounding  — the Lean theorem the author declared in
  //                           closurestatus. Authoritative.
  //   2. namecert_theorems  — heuristic namecert/Name(_)Certificate
  //                           proofs found by NAMECERT_TARGET_RE.
  //   3. (none)             — closed but no grounding, no namecert: hint.
  if (node.closure_grounding) {
    const short = node.closure_grounding.split(".").pop();
    html += `
      <div class="term-namecerts">
        <div class="term-namecerts-header">${t("detail_grounded_by")}</div>
        <div class="nc-row"><span style="color:#8e44ad;">★</span>&nbsp;<code>${short}</code></div>
      </div>`;
  }
  const ncList = node.namecert_theorems || [];
  if (ncList.length) {
    const items = ncList.map(t => {
      const icon = t.status === "checked"
        ? '<span style="color:#27ae60;">✓</span>'
        : '<span style="color:#3498db;">◯</span>';
      return `<div class="nc-row">${icon}&nbsp;<code>${t.short}</code></div>`;
    }).join("");
    html += `
      <div class="term-namecerts">
        <div class="term-namecerts-header">${t("detail_namecerts")} ` +
        `(<strong style="color:#27ae60;">${node.namecert_checked || 0}</strong>` +
        ` / <strong>${ncList.length}</strong>)</div>
        ${items}
      </div>`;
  } else if (node.closed_theoryclosure && !node.closure_grounding) {
    html += `
      <div class="term-namecerts">
        <div class="term-namecerts-header">${t("detail_namecerts")}</div>
        <div class="nc-row" style="color:#666;font-style:italic;">
          ${t("detail_closed_no_grounding")}
        </div>
      </div>`;
  }

  document.getElementById("detail-content").innerHTML = html;
}

function renderCritList() {
  // critical_path has one entry per sibling sub-section, so the same region
  // can appear multiple times. Dedupe by name and keep the first (highest
  // tiebreak) occurrence — that's the entry critical_path.py sorted to top.
  const seen = new Set();
  const cp = (STATUS.critical_path || []).filter(c => {
    if (seen.has(c.name)) return false;
    seen.add(c.name);
    return true;
  }).slice(0, 7);
  const el = document.getElementById("crit-list");
  el.innerHTML = cp.map(c => {
    const g = GLOSSARY[c.name];
    const lbl = g ? g[LANG].label : c.name;
    return `<a onclick="showNodeDetail('${c.name}')">${lbl}<span class="crit-meta">· ${c.thms} thm · score ${c.score.toFixed(2)}</span></a>`;
  }).join("");
}

// Tier rotation order matches critical_path.py phase_review v3.4: list
// the highest-impact transition first so the panel surfaces "what just
// became reachable" rather than rehashing the seed-tier dogpile.
const TRANSITION_ORDER = [
  "to_mature", "to_bridged", "to_public",
  "to_scoped", "to_obligation", "to_seed",
];

function tierLabel(grade) {
  if (!grade) return t("tier_none");
  const key = "tier_" + grade.replace(/Closure$/, "");
  return t(key) || grade;
}

function renderLatestDynamics() {
  // Coverage gauge: closed / (closed + open) horizons.
  const closed = STATUS.closed_horizons || {};
  const closedTotal = Object.values(closed).reduce((s, v) => s + v, 0);
  const openTotal = STATUS.open_horizons || 0;
  const total = closedTotal + openTotal;
  const pct = total ? ((closedTotal / total) * 100).toFixed(1) : "0";
  const breakdown = Object.entries(closed)
    .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
    .map(([k, v]) => {
      const tier = k.split("/")[0];
      return `${v} ${tierLabel(tier)}`;
    })
    .join(" · ");
  document.getElementById("dyn-coverage").innerHTML =
    `<strong>${closedTotal}</strong> / ${total} ${t("dyn_coverage_label")} (${pct}%)` +
    (breakdown ? `<div class="dyn-coverage-breakdown">${breakdown}</div>` : "");

  // Top unblock targets: chapters whose closure unblocks the most downstream.
  const unblocks = (STATUS.top_root_unblocks || []).slice(0, 5);
  const unblockEl = document.getElementById("unblock-list");
  unblockEl.innerHTML = unblocks.length
    ? unblocks.map(u => {
        const g = GLOSSARY[u.name];
        const lbl = g ? g[LANG].label : u.name;
        return `<a onclick="showNodeDetail('${u.name}')">${lbl}<span class="dyn-meta">· ${t("dyn_unblocks_meta")} ${u.unblock_count}</span></a>`;
      }).join("")
    : `<div class="dyn-empty">${t("dyn_none")}</div>`;

  // Next grade transitions: top-1 from each tier in TRANSITION_ORDER.
  const transitions = STATUS.top_transitions || {};
  const flat = [];
  for (const key of TRANSITION_ORDER) {
    const list = transitions[key] || [];
    if (list.length) flat.push(list[0]);
    if (flat.length >= 5) break;
  }
  const nextEl = document.getElementById("next-grade-list");
  nextEl.innerHTML = flat.length
    ? flat.map(n => {
        const g = GLOSSARY[n.name];
        const lbl = g ? g[LANG].label : n.name;
        const from = tierLabel(n.from_grade);
        const to = tierLabel(n.to_grade);
        return `<a onclick="showNodeDetail('${n.name}')">${lbl}<span class="dyn-meta">· ${from} → ${to}</span></a>`;
      }).join("")
    : `<div class="dyn-empty">${t("dyn_none")}</div>`;
}

function renderSpark() {
  const days = STATUS.daily_activity || [];
  if (!days.length) return;
  const svg = document.getElementById("spark");
  const w = svg.clientWidth || 600, h = 28;
  const max = Math.max(...days.map(d => d.commits));
  const stepX = w / Math.max(days.length - 1, 1);
  const points = days.map((d, i) => `${(i * stepX).toFixed(1)},${(h - (d.commits / max) * (h - 4) - 1).toFixed(1)}`).join(" ");
  const dotR = days.length > 60 ? 0.8 : 1.3;
  svg.innerHTML = `
    <polyline fill="none" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="1.4" points="${points}"/>
    ${days.map((d, i) => `<circle cx="${(i * stepX).toFixed(1)}" cy="${(h - (d.commits / max) * (h - 4) - 1).toFixed(1)}" r="${dotR}" fill="#2c3e50"/>`).join("")}
  `;
  const first = days[0]?.day || "";
  const last = days[days.length - 1]?.day || "";
  const total = days.reduce((s, d) => s + d.commits, 0);
  document.getElementById("footer-range").textContent = `${first} – ${last} · ${total} total`;

  const updated = STATUS.generated_at;
  if (updated) {
    const d = new Date(updated);
    const ymd = d.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
    const hm = d.toISOString().slice(11, 16);
    document.getElementById("footer-updated").textContent = `${t("footer_updated")} · ${ymd} ${hm} UTC`;
  }
}

function renderAll() {
  applyStaticI18n();
  if (!CY) renderCy();
  else {
    CY.nodes().forEach(n => {
      const node = DEPS.nodes.find(d => d.id === n.id());
      if (node) n.data("label", nodeLabel(node));
    });
    refreshNodeVisuals();
  }
  buildFilterUI();
  applyFilters();
  renderCritList();
  renderLatestDynamics();
  renderSpark();
  if (CY && CY.nodes(":selected").length) {
    showNodeDetail(CY.nodes(":selected")[0].id());
  } else {
    document.getElementById("detail-content").innerHTML = `<div class="hint">${t("hint")}</div>`;
  }
}

function setLang(lang) {
  LANG = lang;
  renderAll();
  // refresh glossary if open
  const pane = document.getElementById("glossary-pane");
  if (pane && pane.classList.contains("open")) renderGlossary();
}

(async () => {
  try {
    await loadData();
    renderAll();
    window.addEventListener("resize", renderSpark);
  } catch (e) {
    document.getElementById("cy").innerHTML =
      `<div style="padding:2rem;color:red;">Error loading data: ${e.message}</div>`;
  }
})();
</script>
```
